file_insights.purpose: Pydantic data models for Musicalizer application
key_features: Verdict string enum with GOOD/BAD values
SunoOutput with style_prompt, lyrics_prompt, title fields
EvalResult with verdict, score, rationale, strengths/weaknesses/improvements
Preset with comprehensive generation configuration including tempo, language, themes
GenerationRecord for iteration tracking with parent lineage support

patterns_discovered.description: Verdict class inherits from both str and Enum for JSON serialization compatibility
patterns_discovered.significance: Ensures enum values serialize as strings in JSON while maintaining type safety
Enforces semantic validation at model definition level

patterns_discovered.description: List fields use default_factory (list or lambda) instead of default=[]
patterns_discovered.significance: Prevents shared mutable defaults between instances

patterns_discovered.description: Uses Python 3.10+ union syntax (|) for optional types
patterns_discovered.significance: Modern type hint syntax requiring Python 3.10+

patterns_discovered.description: All fields have description parameter in Field()
patterns_discovered.significance: Enables auto-documentation and clear API contracts

gotchas_discovered.description: structural_tags uses default_factory=lambda: [...] instead of list
gotchas_discovered.impact: Correct approach for providing a pre-populated list as default
Code will fail on Python 3.9 and earlier; needs pyproject.toml python_requires field

gotchas_discovered.description: Score field constrains float to 0.0-1.0 but no check for NaN/Infinity
gotchas_discovered.impact: Invalid values (NaN, Inf) will pass validation; may need additional validators if needed

approach_outcome.specification_compliance: FULL - All 5 required models implemented with exact Pattern 4 specification
approach_outcome.notes: Implementation is clean, well-documented, and follows Pydantic best practices. All type hints are correct. Field descriptions are comprehensive and meaningful.

recommendations.recommendation: Ensure pyproject.toml specifies python_requires >= 3.10 due to union type syntax usage
Add model_config settings for JSON serialization preferences (e.g., by_alias=True) if needed for API responses
Consider adding @field_validator for complex business logic (e.g., validating lyric_themes content, preset name format)
Add example values in model docstrings to aid API documentation generation
Consider adding a base_config or model_config for consistent JSON schema generation across all models
